checks.describe: deep-dive: gateway Deployment carries a server-side Apply field manager after the SSA exercise
checks.run: kubectl --context kind-kubeadv-core -n nimbusai get deploy nimbusai-gateway -o jsonpath='{.metadata.managedFields[?(@.operation=="Apply")].manager}'

checks.describe: deep-dive: --force-conflicts apply won the replicas fight — spec.replicas is back at the manifest value 2
checks.run: kubectl --context kind-kubeadv-core -n nimbusai get deploy nimbusai-gateway -o jsonpath='{.spec.replicas}' | tr -d ' \n'

checks.describe: deep-dive: the ReplicaSet is a NEW object recreated after the orphan-delete — its creationTimestamp is later than the Deployment's
checks.run: echo "$(kubectl --context kind-kubeadv-core -n nimbusai get deploy nimbusai-gateway -o jsonpath='{.metadata.creationTimestamp}') $(kubectl --context kind-kubeadv-core -n nimbusai get rs -l app.kubernetes.io/name=nimbusai-gateway -o jsonpath='{.items[0].metadata.creationTimestamp}')" | awk '{ print ($2 > $1) ? "NEW-RS" : "ORIGINAL-RS" }'

checks.describe: deep-dive: kube-controller-manager leader-election Lease is held by an identity on the control-plane node
checks.run: kubectl --context kind-kubeadv-core -n kube-system get lease kube-controller-manager -o jsonpath='{.spec.holderIdentity}'
